summary: B.Tech student in Electronics and Telecommunications with expertise in AI/ML, full-stack development, and competitive programming. Experienced in building production-grade ML systems, agentic AI pipelines, and scalable web platforms. GSoC 2026 contributor at FOSSASIA. Solved 700+ coding problems across competitive platforms.

bullets: Developing a standalone Django plugin for native team and shift management, enabling end-to-end team recruitment, role assignment, and scheduling for large-scale open-source events.
Engineered seamless core platform integration using Django Signals and custom Middleware, dynamically injecting component panels, navigation menus, and access-controlled URL namespaces.
Designed a scalable, multi-tenant data architecture supporting custom team roles, shift capacities, and complex application workflows using PostgreSQL and Django ORM.
Built ML-driven Green Points engine using FastAPI & Random Forest for real-time reward prediction.
Automated e-waste pricing via multi-feature regression and achieved accuracy of R² = 0.85+.
Integrated AI microservice into a Node.js/MongoDB stack with JWT-secured wallet transactions.
Implemented email notification system for registered team members with template conditionals and SMTP integration.
Unified email handling into single canonical field across 4 modules, eliminating duplication.
Built conditional field system with client/server logic, reducing form complexity by 40%.
Redesigned order form UI affecting 100% of ticket checkout flows, fixed 3 critical data persistence bugs.

projects.title: EKIA: Code Debugging Intelligence Assistant
projects.description: Built a 5-node LangGraph agent pipeline (parse → retrieve → reason → validate → respond) with hybrid retrieval by FAISS vector search & Neo4j GraphRAG, enabling context-aware error analysis across 25+ error patterns. Integrated local Llama3 via Ollama with HuggingFace embeddings, Langfuse tracing & confidence scoring.

projects.title: Refine: AI-Powered Resume Optimizer & ATS Analyzer
projects.description: Built resume optimizer raising ATS scores by 45% via prompt-engineered analysis, semantic scoring, & JD alignment. Implemented JWT + Argon2 auth with RBAC, live LaTeX preview, & user profiles via PostgreSQL/SQLAlchemy.

projects.title: FinMate: Smart UPI-Based Expense & Budgeting Assistant
projects.description: Built an SMS-based UPI parser with 92%+ accuracy for extracting amount, merchant, and UPI ID. Added SQLite-backed transaction & budget CRUD and Zustand state management with modular UI.

projects.title: Apta: Smart Lifestyle & Learning Recommender
projects.description: Built TF-IDF vectorization + cosine similarity to get accurate recommendation over 150 lifestyle items. Created time/interest-based filtering, reducing irrelevant suggestions by 70% through scoring algorithms.

items: CodeChef: Rating 1682 | 3 Stars | Top 4.73% | 400+ problems | 2X Top 100 in Contests
